Meeting Notes — Q3 Engineering Planning Session

Attendees: Sarah, James, Priya, Tom

Agenda:
  1. Review Q2 delivery status
  2. Set Q3 objectives
  3. Identify blockers and action items

Discussion:
  - Sprint velocity averaged 42 story points over the quarter
  - Two key features shipped on time; one delayed by external dependency
  - Team raised concern about integration pipeline reliability

Action items:
  - Sarah to draft Q3 objectives by end of week
  - James to investigate pipeline flakiness and report findings
  - Priya to schedule follow-up meeting with product team
  - Tom to update the delivery scorecard template

Decisions:
  - Move to bi-weekly retrospectives starting next sprint
  - Adopt new branching strategy for hotfixes
